title: Sanex Derma Care Invisible 48-Hour Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant 6x50ml – long-lasting freshness against sweat and odour – gently cares for skin – contains 0% alcohol* – protects against stains
features: 48-HOUR FRESHNESS: Our roll-on antiperspirant helps protect against sweat and odour for up to 48 hours so you can take on the day with confidence
SOFT ON SKIN: Our specially formulated antiperspirant deodorant is gentle on underarm skin and treats it with the respect it deserves
PROTECTS AGAINST STAINS: Take on whatever the day has in store with our worry-free anti-stain formula
MINIMISES RISK OF IRRITATION: Our 0% alcohol* antiperspirant deodorant cares for your gentle underarm skin and helps minimise the risk of irritation
RECOMMENDED BY EXPERTS: Our long-lasting antiperspirant has been dermatologically tested and certified by the British Skin Foundation
description: Product Description Stay fresh and dry for the day ahead with our Sanex Derma Care Invisible Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant. Our dermatologically tested, 48-hour antiperspirant offers effective protection against sweat and odour while taking gentle care of your underarm skin. It’s also designed to prevent leaving traces on your clothes, towels and sheets, so you can go about your day with confidence. Certified by the British Skin Foundation, our deodorant roll-on is formulated with 0% alcohol* and has been specially designed to minimise the risk of unwanted irritation on your gentle underarm skin. Not to mention, our alcohol-free antiperspirant deodorant effectively helps to keep skin fresh and dry for up to 48 hours. Prepare for whatever the day has in store with our strong antiperspirant that helps skin perform at its healthy best. *Does not contain ethanol. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs.
